commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor live proof or maintainer acceptance of the proof gap, not a mechanical code repair.; Cleared: The diff only changes LM Studio preload context selection and tests; it adds no dependency, workflow, lockfile, permission, secret-handling, or supply-chain execution surface. (sha=bc350636b98360e5d6e8b7505704fe7873e96632)
commands.review_summary:
The PR resolves LM Studio embedding preload context length from existing model/provider contextTokens and contextWindow config and passes it to ensureLmstudioModelLoaded, with regression tests for precedence cases.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +179. Total +203 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main and v2026.6.11 call the LM Studio embedding load helper without requestedContextLength while the helper defaults upward before sending context_length; I did not reproduce the CUDA OOM live.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor live proof or maintainer acceptance of the proof gap, not a mechanical code repair.

target.title: fix(lmstudio): pass configured contextWindow to embedding model preload
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

LM Studio embedding preload calls `ensureLmstudioModelLoaded` without `requestedContextLength`, causing LM Studio to load models with the maximum supported context length (32K). On GPUs with limited VRAM this triggers CUDA OOM.

**Root cause**: The embedding provider path in `createLmstudioEmbeddingProvider` omitted `requestedContextLength` from the `ensureLmstudioModelLoaded` call, unlike the inference path which resolves it via `resolveRequestedContextLength`.

**Fix**: Resolve `requestedContextLength` from the model config (`contextTokens` â†’ `contextWindow`) with provider-level fallback, and pass it to `ensureLmstudioModelLoaded`.

Closes #97016

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Extension (LM Studio provider)

## Evidence

**Before fix (main @ 80c754d):** The embedding provider call omits `requestedContextLength`.

**After fix:** Model-level contextWindow=8192 â†’ passed as `requestedContextLength`. Provider-level fallback when model has no config. Omits when neither has config.

**Test evidence:** 5/5 new regression tests pass (model contextWindow, model contextTokens priority, provider fallback, provider contextTokens priority, no-config omit). Existing LM Studio tests: 98/98 pass.

**Runtime proof:**
```text
$ node --import tsx --no-warnings proof-97016.mjs
model contextWindow=8192 â†’ 8192
model contextTokens=4096 (over contextWindow=32768) â†’ 4096
provider contextWindow=16384 â†’ 16384
provider contextTokens=2048 â†’ 2048
no config â†’ undefined
âś… All assertions passed
```

**Not tested:** Live LM Studio with CUDA GPU. Verified via real production SDK function (`asPositiveSafeInteger`) and resolution precedence logic.

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
target.author: zoowh

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
